source: reviewed/Ars Magica - Definitive Edition (Core Rules).md (Covenants; Realms; Mythic Europe) + corpus gazetteer
note: Location archetypes (and a few named sites) for framing scenes. Each carries the Realm/aura that governs casting there. Deeper, named gazetteer detail lives in the Tribunal books under reviewed/ and wip/.

elements.name: The Covenant
elements.summary: The magi's fortified home — towers or a castle over a Magic aura, with library, labs, sancta, and covenfolk.
elements.as_thread: A crisis at home: the aura, the library, the turb, or a sanctum is threatened.

elements.name: A Regio
elements.summary: Nested layers of stronger aura sharing one place; higher 'floors' are stranger and realm-aligned. Entry: be led, see-and-cross, or get lost.
elements.as_thread: A regio opens, hides something, or swallows a place.

elements.name: A Faerie Forest
elements.summary: A wood thick with Faerie aura, home to satyrs, dryads, and courts, often with a regio of Arcadia within.
elements.as_thread: The forest's fae draw travellers into a tale or bargain.

elements.name: A Dominion Town or Church
elements.summary: A town, cathedral, or holy site wrapped in a Dominion aura (1–5, up to 10 at the holiest) that crushes Hermetic magic.
elements.as_thread: Business in town under the Dominion's weight, amid wary clergy and crowds.

elements.name: An Infernal Site
elements.summary: A place of repeated sin or demonic activity — vile, stinking, reopening wounds and conflicts; stronger by night.
elements.as_thread: An Infernal aura festers where a diabolist or demon works.

elements.name: A Ruined Covenant
elements.summary: A fallen covenant — vis, lost texts, enchanted devices, and restless dead amid the rubble of old magi.
elements.as_thread: Explore a ruined covenant for its secrets and its dangers.

elements.name: A Vis Source
elements.summary: A supernatural site yielding a recurring 1–6 (rarely 10) pawns of one Art's vis each season — a covenant's supreme treasure.
elements.as_thread: Secure, defend, or contest the vis source.

elements.name: Durenmar
elements.summary: The domus magna of House Bonisagus in the Black Forest; site of the Order's founding and the Grand Tribunal (every 33 years).
elements.as_thread: A summons, a vote, or a matter of the Great Library calls the magi to Durenmar.
